summary: Completed testing of GDPR-compliant registration flow. All backend APIs and frontend UI elements are working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ server.py (line 657-658): Correctly validates accepted_terms and returns 400 if false
✅ server.py (line 680-683): Properly stores accepted_terms, accepted_terms_at, accepted_marketing, accepted_marketing_at in database
✅ server.py (line 3005-3008): Admin API correctly returns GDPR consent fields for each user
✅ Login.tsx (lines 220-320): Registration form has two checkboxes - mandatory terms and optional marketing
✅ Login.tsx (lines 329-433): Terms modal contains full GDPR-compliant legal text including sections on Personuppgifter, GDPR rights, and contact info
✅ Admin.tsx (lines 285-316): User table displays GDPR-samtycke and Nyhetsbrev columns with consent status badges
seed_data_creation: Admin user created with email info@auroramedia.se for admin panel testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: GDPR registration flow fully tested. Backend validates terms acceptance, stores consent flags with timestamps. Frontend displays two checkboxes (terms mandatory, marketing optional), terms modal with full legal text, and admin panel shows consent status columns. Test file test_gdpr_registration.py can be used for regression testing.

details.terms_link: Clickable link opens modal with full terms

details.submit_button: Disabled until terms checkbox is checked

details.gdpr_rights: Includes tillgång, rättelse, radering, dataportabilitet, invända, återkalla samtycke
details.contact_info: Aurora Media AB, info@auroramedia.se, IMY reference

details.gdpr_samtycke_column: Shows ✅ Godkänt or ❌ Nej with date
details.api_response: Returns all consent fields for each user

details.note: Email sending code present in server.py lines 728-778
details.limitation: Resend test mode only sends to verified domain emails

ui_tests_summary.test: Admin panel accessible for admin user
Admin API returns GDPR consent fields
